title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
summary: The ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, signed last month, faces serious strain after consecutive days of military exchanges this week. Despite Trump's assertion that the ceasefire is over, both countries are continuing technical diplomatic talks. This development reflects ongoing tensions in the Middle East and the fragility of recent de-escalation efforts.
content: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

zh.title: 特朗普声称停火"已结束"后，美国继续与伊朗进行"技术性谈判"
zh.summary: 上月签署的美伊停火协议在本周连续多日军事交火后面临严重挑战。尽管特朗普宣称停火已结束，两国仍继续进行技术性外交谈判。这一发展反映了中东地区持续的紧张局势以及近期缓和努力的脆弱性。

title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in mega US share sale
summary: SK Hynix is raising $26.5 billion in what will be the largest-ever U.S. Nasdaq debut by a foreign company. The shares begin trading Friday, marking a major financial milestone for the South Korean chipmaker. This offering reflects strong investor appetite for semiconductor companies amid growing AI demand.
content: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.

zh.title: 芯片巨头SK海力士融资265亿美元进行大规模美国股票发行
zh.summary: SK海力士融资265亿美元，这将成为外国公司在美国纳斯达克上市的最大规模。其股票将于周五开始交易，标志着这家韩国芯片制造商的重大财务里程碑。这次发行反映了投资者对半导体公司的强烈需求，这是由人工智能需求增长推动的。

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in U.S. offering. What to know about the stock.
summary: SK Hynix's $26.5 billion U.S. stock offering provides American investors with direct exposure to the booming memory chip market. The company's IPO reflects intense demand for semiconductors, particularly driven by AI applications. This offering represents a significant opportunity for those seeking to invest in the chip sector.
content: U.S. investors are about to get another straightforward way to play the red-hot market for memory chips.

zh.title: SK海力士融资265亿美元进行美国股票发行。关于该股票需要了解的事项。
zh.summary: SK海力士265亿美元的美国股票发行为美国投资者提供了直接接触蓬勃发展的存储芯片市场的机会。该公司的首次公开募股反映了对半导体的强烈需求，特别是由人工智能应用驱动的。这次发行对于寻求投资芯片行业的人来说是一个重大机会。

title: Stock futures dip after chip-led rally; SoftBank soars 11% as Asia tech stocks rise: Live updates
summary: Asian tech stocks surged with SoftBank rising 11%, while U.S. stock futures dipped after strong gains in chipmaker shares and falling oil prices. The market movements reflect ongoing volatility and sector rotation between regions. These developments highlight investor focus on technology companies amid shifting energy costs.
content: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

zh.title: 芯片股反弹后股指期货下跌；软银股价飙升11%，亚洲科技股涨势强劲：实时更新
zh.summary: 亚洲科技股大幅上涨，软银股价上升11%，而美国股指期货在芯片制造商股票强势上涨和油价下跌后有所下跌。市场走势反映了地区间持续的波动性和板块轮动。这些发展凸显了投资者对科技公司的关注，同时能源成本也在变化。
